component.name: SSHVault
component.summary: Zero-knowledge encrypted SSH and terminal client

description.p: SSHVault is a secure SSH client with zero-knowledge encrypted sync across devices. Manage SSH connections, keys, and snippets with end-to-end encryption — the server never sees your data.
Features:

ul.li: SSH terminal with full xterm emulation
Zero-knowledge sync with AES-256-GCM and Argon2id

description.p: iOS / iPadOS desktop integration pass: ssh:// + sftp:// URL handlers, Files-app browse, iCloud Keychain sync toggle, Siri Shortcuts / App Intents (Connect to host / Quick connect / Reopen last), Core Spotlight indexing, UIDropInteraction drag-and-drop for SSH keys, native UINotificationFeedbackGenerator haptics, BGTaskScheduler periodic background refresh, iPadOS multi-window per session via requestSceneSessionActivation, external-keyboard shortcuts ⌘N / ⌘W / ⌘T / ⌘, / ⌘F / ⌃Tab / ⌃⇧Tab, AirDrop share sheet for public keys, Live Activities for active SSH sessions on Lock Screen and Dynamic Island, WidgetKit Home Screen + Lock Screen widgets, Face ID / Touch ID pre-unlock, App Transport Security tightened to disallow arbitrary loads, keychain access group for extensions, and NSFileProtectionComplete data-protection class on the SQLCipher database file.

Android desktop integration pass: ssh:// + sftp:// URL handlers and .pub/.pem/.ppk file associations, static + dynamic App Shortcuts, Quick Settings Tile, Foreground Service for active sessions, WakeLock power-inhibit, Android 12+ Splash Screen API, adaptive + themed launcher icon, edge-to-edge for Android 15+, Material You / Dynamic Color, home-screen widget, Picture-in-Picture for terminal, per-severity Notification Channels, Material 3 haptics, WorkManager-backed periodic background sync (opt-in), predictive-back animation, AAB language / density / ABI splits with ProGuard keep rules, auto-backup excludes the vault DB, cleartext traffic disabled by default, Android Keystore (StrongBox preferred / TEE fallback) wraps the master vault key, optional Screen-Pinning helper.

macOS desktop integration pass (partial): ssh:// + sftp:// URL scheme handlers, native NSMenu with Apple-standard shortcuts, NSAppearance live-follow, macOS Services menu provider, NSDraggingDestination drag-and-drop SSH key import, NSVisualEffectView vibrancy backdrop with transparent titlebar and full-size content view, native NSWindow tabs, unified compact toolbar with restoration identifier, native UNUserNotificationCenter toasts via local_notifier with Reconnect / Disconnect / Show action buttons, Quick Look extension scaffold for .pub / .pem / .ppk previews, Apple Privacy Manifest (PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy) + privacy-usage descriptions in Info.plist. Items still queued: Keychain backend, 1Password / Secretive ssh-agent detection, SMAppService login item, IOPMAssertion power inhibit, NSStatusItem menu-bar icon, Touch ID pre-unlock, Core Spotlight indexing.

Windows desktop integration pass: ssh:// + sftp:// URL handlers and .pub/.pem/.ppk file associations, named-mutex single instance with WM_COPYDATA argv forwarding, Windows Credential Manager (Wincred / DPAPI) backend for the master vault key with Windows Hello pre-unlock, Pageant + OpenSSH-for-Windows agent compatibility, WM_DROPFILES drag-and-drop key import, native Windows toast notifications via local_notifier with action buttons and Action-Center persistence, HKCU\...\Run\SSHVault auto-start, SetThreadExecutionState power-inhibit during sessions, Windows 11 Mica backdrop with Acrylic fallback plus dark-mode title bar and rounded corners via DWM, Jump List (taskbar right-click) with recent + favorite hosts and Quick-connect / Reopen-last-session tasks, ITaskbarList3 thumbnail toolbar mini-buttons and SFTP transfer progress, console window hidden in Release (subsystem WINDOWS) with Per-Monitor V2 DPI awareness and GDI scaling, PuTTY .ppk import (v2 + v3, encrypted + unencrypted), MiniDumpWriteDump crash-dump handler writing redacted .dmp files to %LOCALAPPDATA%\SSHVault\crashes\, and an opt-in Windows Defender folder-exclusion prompt during install.

Linux desktop integration deepens: power-management inhibit during active SSH sessions (login1.Inhibit), per-monitor window-state persistence, XDG-autostart toggle, polished tray-only boot with close-to-tray and resume-on-login, Wayland clipboard persistence via wl-copy --foreground, HiDPI per-monitor scaling with manual override, full xdg-desktop-portal migration for file pickers / secrets / links, AppArmor profile for native distros, comprehensive command-line argv (HOSTNAME, user@host:port, --import-config / --import-keys / --export-vault / --version / --help / --quit) with bash + zsh completion, native GTK / Plasma file-chooser routing, DBus activation with Quick-connect / Reopen-last-session .desktop Actions and org.freedesktop.Application interface, and a configurable global keyboard shortcut (default Super+Shift+S) via xdg-desktop-portal GlobalShortcuts.

Linux desktop integration pass: ssh:// + sftp:// URL handlers, system tray (AppIndicator/SNI) with favorites and active sessions, DBus service de.kiefer_networks.SSHVault for single-instance + external triggers from rofi/polybar/KRunner, KRunner plugin, libsecret-backed master-key storage in GNOME Keyring / KWallet, ssh-agent integration so git/scp/ansible/vscode-remote-ssh can use SSHVault keys, follow GNOME / KDE preferred color scheme via xdg-desktop-portal, and drag-and-drop SSH keys onto the window to auto-import.
Android: liboqs.so is now built with 16 KB ELF page alignment so Google Play accepts the upload on Android 15+ devices. Other native libs (libflutter, libapp, libsqlite3) were already aligned.

Drops READ_MEDIA_IMAGES / READ_MEDIA_VIDEO permission inherited from image_picker so Google Play accepts the upload (the app uses the Photo Picker, which needs no permission). Android disconnects now appear as a system-shade notification with an inline Reconnect action button; the prior in-app slide-up dialog is gone.

Android now uses the OS notification shade instead of in-app SnackBar overlays so messages no longer cover the UI. List padding above the FAB cluster bumped to 144 dp so the floating add/search buttons no longer sit on top of the last server tile's edit / info actions.

Fixes hybrid post-quantum SSH KEX wire format and shared-secret derivation against OpenSSH 9.9+ servers — mlkem768x25519 client public-key blob now sends the KEM half before the X25519 half, server reply parsing matches, and the resulting shared secret is HASH(kem_ss || x25519_ss) (SHA-256 for ML-KEM, SHA-512 for sntrup761) before being string-encoded into the exchange hash. 1.10.2 negotiated the algorithm but failed at the first encrypted packet.
CI fix: Flatpak liboqs module now uses CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR instead of the meson-style --libdir flag (cmake-ninja rejected the latter).

Fixes liboqs Flatpak SHA256 mismatch and reduces the per-platform liboqs build to just ML-KEM-768 and sntrup761 so the macOS, Windows, Android and Flatpak release jobs finish without exhausting the runner's process table.

Adds hybrid post-quantum SSH key exchange (mlkem768x25519-sha256, sntrup761x25519-sha512@openssh.com) via the Open Quantum Safe liboqs library. Connects to OpenSSH 9.9+ servers configured for PQ-only KEX without breaking classical fallback.
Format pass fixes CI; no behavior changes from 1.9.2.
Connect dialog now explains which SSH algorithm class (KEX, cipher, MAC, host key) the server requires when none overlap with the client. README documents supported algorithms.
Fixes a widget test regression by routing native desktop notifications through defaultTargetPlatform; ships regenerated localization bindings.
Sync now propagates deletes via tombstones and uses per-entity last-write-wins for renames and reorders, fixing data resurrecting between devices.
System notifications on Linux and Windows; redesigned folder section headers; grid view honors mode toggle; search moved to FAB; expanded icon library; min/max/close window controls on Linux.
Initial release.
